author: codex-duplication-audit

patch.value: Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: jscpd found src/cli/commands/docs.ts and src/cli/commands/files.ts share large command bodies: imports and option setup, path/spec parsing, artifact normalization, dedupe/sort handling, add/remove/list flows, and rendering blocks. Representative clones include docs.ts:24-54 vs files.ts:34-64, docs.ts:61-88 vs files.ts:105-132, docs.ts:94-161 vs files.ts:138-205, docs.ts:213-243 vs files.ts:288-318, and docs.ts:319-354 vs files.ts:535-570. Existing pm-3eu2/pm-n2ts are closed feature work, and pm-why9 covers CLI parser blocks but not the linked-resource command twin implementation. Fix by extracting a typed linked-artifact command core parameterized by resource kind, metadata key, validation, and rendering labels.

files/docs command behavior is driven by one shared implementation with kind-specific adapters; duplicate parsing, add/remove/list, dedupe/sort, and render logic is removed from docs.ts/files.ts; existing files/docs unit and integration coverage passes; pnpm build passes.

message: Create duplicate-code finding after duplicate-check search

value.author: linked-resource-dedup-lane
value.text: Investigation plan from linked-resource-dedup-lane: zero-behavior-change extraction should introduce a shared linked artifact core, likely src/cli/commands/linked-artifacts.ts, used by runFiles and runDocs while leaving files discover in files.ts. Extract shared helpers for ensureScope/default project scope, structured path detection, parseAddEntries with kind-specific bare-path noun in the error message, parseAddGlobEntries, parseRemoveEntries, parseMigrateEntries/applyPathMigrations, expandAddGlobEntries, key/sort/dedupe with note trimming, validateLinkedPaths, buildLinkedPathAudit, and the common runLinkedArtifacts mutation/list flow parameterized by metadata key files|docs, op files_add|docs_add, result field files|docs, and optional appendStable ordering. Keep wrappers in files.ts/docs.ts exporting current option/result names. Risk points: docs currently always sorts and has no appendStable option, so do not accidentally add append-stable docs behavior; preserve exact error strings (bare file path vs bare doc path), implicit scope=project and explicit scope=global semantics, stdin token resolution, glob cwd/path normalization, remove-by-path matching regardless of scope, migration warning/count semantics, validation/audit payload names/order, changed=true for mutation attempts, metadata deletion when empty, author/message/force ownership flow, and search-cache invalidation behavior in register-mutation. Focused tests after refactor: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/files-docs-command.spec.ts; node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/integration/cli.integration.spec.ts -t "keeps repeated files/docs add flows stable across subsequent commands"; node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/integration/cli.integration.spec.ts -t "add-glob"; pnpm build. Scope estimate: medium, 1 new core module plus thin wrappers, no command/contract/docs changes expected.
